title: Ancient Music in an Ancient Place
description: Spodo Komodo are a three piece band specialising in Renaissance and early folk music. Their choice of venue is not a pub or bar, but a historic building. They have played at the medieval Guildhall in Lincoln and at the 17th century Red Hall in Bourne.

title: Inside the crumbling ancient crusaders castle captured by Israel deep inside Lebanon... & why it’s STILL a prized fortress
description: ISRAELI troops have captured a crusader-era castle deep inside Lebanon, holding the strategic fortress for the first time since 2000. Despite dating back to the 12th century, Beaufort castle is still a prized military asset, offering unparalleled views of the region north of Israel's northern border. Taking the hilltop castle, near the city of Nabatiyeh,...

title: Cathedral organist to perform in ancient Yorkshire Dales church
description: A CONCERT of organ and accordion music will take place at St Michael's, Kirkby Malham on Saturday (June 6).

title: Kansas boy finds massive 80-million-year-old fossil while on field trip
description: 12-year-old Clearwater, Kansas geology fan Corbin Bullard found a 15ft fossil of an 80-million-year-old Tylosaurus while on a school field trip in September...
